files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Added optional relevance_scores dict param to NDCG.compute for graded relevance; touches same ideal_length/idcg block as your min(retrieved,expected) fix, but kept ideal_length calc as min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) unchanged, only replaced binary rel with per-doc scores - flag if you rebase to len(expected_set) so scores stay compatible
